title: Scopper Gaban Tests Luffy
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Nami, Unknown person #1, Luffy, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Loki as Luffy, Zoro, and Nami push toward freeing Loki while Scopper Gaban tests them and God’s Knights begin a darker move against Elbaf’s children.
scene: Luffy, Zoro, and Nami push toward freeing Loki while Scopper Gaban tests them and God’s Knights begin a darker move against Elbaf’s children.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In the 14 years since King Harald's death...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Elbaf - Quest Castle

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...No one has come near this castle!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: --So what's going on here?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The door looks like it's been busted open!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WHAT HAPPENED TO THE GUARDS?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What?! Something's wrong?!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The key!! Where's the key?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: it was broken from the inside; why would "intruders" do that?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ONLY ONE WAY TO FIND OUT! LET'S GO!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The damage looks recent!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: W-wait, this is underlying...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: This place is HUUUGE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I can barely see the ceiling...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is way too vast to be walkable!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hey, RODO!! know where the key is?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: NOO...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I-I'm just a run-of-the-mill guy; I've never even been in here before!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Well, I'm glad you're here now!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Really, Nami- TASO?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Agreed, now get moving!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wow... what a castle!! Being here is thrilling and terrifying!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: everything's falling to pieces. Is this the intruders' handiwork?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Tap tap

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, this battle damage has been here ever since...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ...LOKi killed King Harald...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: This took some serious destructive power...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Loki is a monster... and King Harald was renowned as a great warrior.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: This damage was inevitable.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What?! they're so big!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: HUH?! this is scary!! are they!!!

summary: This part advances the Scopper Gaban and Elbaf’s New Threat through 31 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
